gt_sql: SELECT T2.colour FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN colour AS T2 ON T1.eye_colour_id = T2.id INNER JOIN colour AS T3 ON T1.skin_colour_id = T3.id WHERE T3.colour = 'Gold'
pred_sql:
SELECT c2.colour
FROM superhero s
JOIN colour c1 ON s.skin_colour_id = c1.id
JOIN colour c2 ON s.eye_colour_id = c2.id
WHERE c1.colour = 'Gold';
question: Provide the eye colours of the heroes whose skin colours are gold.
